sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77052" key="pambaki/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παμβᾰκίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n77052.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">βαμβάκιον</ref></xr>, in pl., <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.254.6</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Myrin.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
